steps.title: Recognize the exterior angle configuration
steps.content: The angle labeled $x$ is outside the triangle, so first find the interior angle next to it.

steps.title: Find the third interior angle
steps.content: The two given interior angles are $50^\circ$ and $70^\circ$. The angles in a triangle add to $180^\circ$, so the third interior angle is $$180^\circ-50^\circ-70^\circ=60^\circ.$$

steps.title: Use the straight line
steps.content: The $60^\circ$ interior angle and the exterior angle $x$ form a straight line, so they are supplementary: $$x=180^\circ-60^\circ=120^\circ.$$
